1700440.name: Age Of Blocks
1700440.description:
In Age of Blocks, gathering resources and mining blocks are at the heart of your kingdom’s survival and expansion. Send your workers to chop down towering trees for wood, harvest bushes and catch fish to keep your army fed, and mine precious gold to fund your growing empire. Every resource plays a vital role, fueling construction, recruitment, and technological advances. As you collect blocks from the voxel-based world, you'll unlock the power to shape the land itself—place blocks to build walls, raise towers, and design your perfect stronghold. Whether you're fortifying defenses or expanding your city, mastering resource collection and block placement is key to defending Azuria!

Building your civilization is a journey of strategy and creativity. With 13 unique types of buildings at your disposal—from humble houses and bustling farms to powerful barracks and advanced research centers—you'll shape a thriving kingdom tailored to your playstyle. As your city grows, unlock a wide range of technologies that boost your economy, strengthen your armies, and unlock new tactical possibilities. Advance through different ages of civilization to gain access to more powerful structures, elite units, and game-changing upgrades. Every decision you make brings you one step closer to turning your fledgling settlement into the most formidable empire in all of Azuria!

Leading your army into battle is where your strategy truly comes to life. Train and command a diverse roster of units such as fearless Footmen, swift Lancers, and devastating Warhounds on the front lines. Rain arrows from afar with Longbowmen and Crossbowmen, or unleash heavy siege power with Catapults, Rams, and the deadly Scorpio. Dominate the seas with powerful Galleons and Scorpio Ships, transport your troops across the map with Transport Ships. Monks can provide crucial support on the battlefield, turning the tide with healing. As you research new technologies, your units become stronger, faster, and deadlier, giving you the edge you need to crush your enemy.
1700440.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
